tool_args.label: Disability Pride Month Event - Abilities ERG

payload.description: Abilities ERG in conjunction with The Office of Accessibility highlighted various dedicated transportation programs offered at MTA for people with disabilities. Panel of MTA employees highlighting programs such as Navilens and Magnus apps.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Abilities Pride Month July 2024

In honor of Disability Pride Month, Abilities ERG in conjunction with The Office of Accessibility highlighted the various dedicated transportation programs offered at MTA for people with disabilities.

tool_args.label: MNR ADA Accessibility - Harlem Line Stations

payload.project_name: Metro-North Railroad ADA Accessibility and State of Good Repair - Harlem Line Stations
payload.description: Address ADA accessibility and State of Good Repair conditions at three Metro-North Railroad stations serving the Harlem Line in the Bronx. Williams Bridge and Woodlawn will become fully compliant; Botanical Garden will enhance accessibility by replacing existing ramps and elevator cabs and making repairs. More than 75% of Metro-North full-service stations will be ADA-compliant upon completion.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA will address ADA accessibility and State of Good Repair conditions at three (3) Metro-North Railroad stations serving the Harlem Line in the Bronx.

tool_args.label: Expand CityTicket to Peak Hour Travel

payload.project_name: Expand CityTicket to Peak Hour Travel
payload.description: Expand CityTicket to peak hour travel on Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad. CityTickets are good for one-way travel that begins and ends within New York City.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Expand CityTicket to peak hour travel on Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad.

tool_args.label: CityTicket Expansion as DEI Strategy

payload.claim_text: Expand CityTicket to peak hour travel on Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad. This is included as a DEI strategy because it primarily supports a diverse population of NYC-based customers, some of whom are socioeconomically disadvantaged.
payload.subject: CityTicket expansion

evidence_refs.source_quote: Expand CityTicket to peak hour travel on Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad. This is included as a DEI strategy because it primarily supports a diverse population of NYC-based customers
